plugins.name: kysely-postgres
plugins.description: Type-safe Kysely query patterns for PostgreSQL

plugins.name: nuxt-nitro-api
plugins.description: Nuxt 3 / Nitro API patterns: validation, auth, SSR, tasks, SSE

plugins.name: nitro-testing
plugins.description: Test Nitro handlers with real PostgreSQL, transaction rollback, factories

plugins.name: linear
plugins.description: Create, triage, and manage Linear issues following Gallop team conventions, with a GraphQL CLI for operations the Linear MCP server doesn't expose

plugins.name: doctl
plugins.description: Manage DigitalOcean resources with the doctl CLI: auth contexts, App Platform deployments and logs, app specs and secrets, repo-to-app resolution, databases, Spaces, and droplets

plugins.name: git-github
plugins.description: Git and GitHub (gh CLI) workflows for agents: the branch-to-PR loop, PR/CI state, debugging failed Actions runs, repair ladders for stuck git states, gh api recipes, and release flows

plugins.name: copier-template
plugins.description: Maintain a Copier project template and propagate updates to generated repos: template anatomy, testing changes, releasing versions, and applying copier update with conflict resolution
